title: 60cm Beautiful Artificial Grass Bouquet | Indoor Floral Decorative Artificial Flora | Ornamental Faux Floral Grass Spray - Design Varies One Supplied
features: ARTIFICIAL GRASS BOUQUET | Fill a space beautifully with this stunning artificial bouquet. This faux spray looks incredibly realistic and is great for bringing a bit of nature into your home
FAUX FLORAL GRASS | Our faux bouquets come in 4 assorted designs - one will be selected and sent at random. (Please contact our customer service team if you have a preferred design choice)

DECORATIVE FLORAL GRASS | The freestanding grass spray can be used in a variety of ways, from table centrepieces to floor-standing arrangements. Just as pretty displayed on your kitchen table or windowsill, these lovely grass bouquets give you the fresh flora feel without the fuss
FLORA GRASS SPRAY | This artificial bouquet is an excellent decor choice for those who want to add a touch of nature to their space without the hassle of maintaining real plants
FAUX GRASS DECOR | Measuring 60cm this faux bouquet creates an eye-catching focal point. Ideal for decorating weddings and events
